description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a combination of flat and gable roofs. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a garage, a manicured lawn, and a pathway bordered by shrubs and trees. The structure is primarily composed of light brown and white materials, with large windows distributed across the exterior walls. The rear of the property includes a private backyard with additional green space and mature trees, providing a sense of privacy. The building appears to have two distinct sections, one with a flat roof and the other with a gable roof, suggesting a blend of traditional and contemporary architectural elements. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a focus on open grassy areas and a few decorative trees.
description: A modern bungalow with flat and gable roofs, large windows, a driveway, and landscaped green spaces with trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, flat roof section, and backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, gable roof, and additional trees for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, side lawn, and rear landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows
